hero.hLine2: and the software they fly on.
hero.lead: Embedded-systems and full-stack engineer. I founded a TEKNOFEST UAV team and engineer the autonomous flight electronics, computer vision, and production software end to end.
hero.cred1: Flight controllers, sensor fusion, autonomous mission planning
hero.cred2: Production full-stack: React, Node, GraphQL, Kubernetes
hero.cred3: Tofaş Fen Lisesi, Bursa · TEKNOFEST competitor

stratos.title: STRATOS İHA
stratos.body: I founded STRATOS İHA, a student TEKNOFEST UAV community at Tofaş Fen Lisesi. I lead Electronics & Software across autonomous quadrotors, FPV racing drones, and VEX robotics, and grew the team to four departments and seven core members.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Open to internships and engineering collaborations in embedded systems, autonomous robotics, and full-stack software.
contact.availability: Based in Bursa, Türkiye · usually replies within a day

footer.colophon: Designed and built by Emir Sakarya in Bursa, Türkiye.
